roa.docketEntryComment: SURRENDER
SURRENDER
DEFT OFFERS APOLOGY TO COURT & POLICE OFFICER,CLEMONS/J,$259$200 REST PD IN FULL IN OPEN COURT,IN CASH(GIVEN TO CSR TO MAIL TO OFFICER W/ANY OF DEFT'S APOLOGY)

IN CAMERA HRG;A/JWV;CT1-10851(A)VC-SP3Y/ESS;CT2-2800,2-SP2Y/ESS C/CTERM C/C TO ACTION#137850;ALLEGS PUR 12022,1PC-STYD;5YPROB;CTS198D;W/SACL CNSLNG BY APD;NO WEA;NOT ASSOC W/KNOWN CRIMINALREST ALL VCTM&10%FEE;$100RF-STYD PENDING PYMNT REST;$25PC;ACCEPTS PROBCTS 3,4,5 & 6-MO DISM BY DA
ESS LIFTED-CT1-SP3Y;CC TO #137850;CT2-SP2Y;190CJ--94SAGE=CTS284D;VF1
BWR 103194;CONT TO 110394 S25 845AM FOR SAME
DEFT FTA;BW;NB;OR REVK
BW;OR REV'D-STAY 9/7/94 AT 845AM S25 FOR SURRENDER
DEFT PERS ADV MORRISEY/CONSTL RTS;DEFT WVS RT FOR HRGCONT 8/31/94 AT 845AM IN S25 FOR SURRENDER/REMAND & SENT
CONT 7/13/94 AT 845AM IN S25 FOR HG MTR/DA
CONT 5/18/94 AT 845AM IN S25 FOR TS OR DISPO (MTR/DA)
TRANSF TO D25 FOR HG MTR/DA AT 845AM ON 5/18/94
ADDNL CTS24D
CLERK REC'D $132 FOR REST;PROB CONT SAME T/C
CNSL APPTD;REF APD S/R TOBE FILED 5/27/93;REMANDED
MO TO W/D PLEA NG-GRTD;ADV/PERS WVS CONST RTS;ADM ALLEG 12022,1PC EA CTPLD G CT1-10851(A)VC & CT2-2800,2VC;CT MKS FINDINGS
DEEMED PRETRIED
CNSL APPTD;ARR;PLD NG EA CT W/ATTENDANT ALLEGS AS TO CTS 1 & 2
HTA, B/S $10,000, MISD CERT TO SUP CT
DEFT REMAND INTO CUST,B/S $10,000(TOTAL),DA MOT CONT PX GRANTED
